Exposes.name: led_mode
Exposes.label: LED Mode
Exposes.description: Controls the behaviour of the LED rings around the sockets

Exposes.name: led_night_mode
Exposes.label: LED night mode
Exposes.description: Adjust LED brightness during night time

Exposes.name: ip_address
Exposes.label: IP address
Exposes.description: IP address currently assigned to the device

Exposes.name: dhcp_enabled
Exposes.label: DHCP enabled
Exposes.description: Indicates whether DHCP is used to automatically assign network settings

features.name: ssid
features.label: Network
features.description: Name (SSID) of the Wi-Fi network to connect to

features.name: password
features.label: Password
features.description: Password for the selected Wi-Fi network

features.name: static_ip
features.label: IPv4 address
features.description: Manually assigned IP address (used when DHCP is disabled)

features.name: net_mask
features.label: Network mask
features.description: Subnet mask for the static IP configuration

features.name: gateway
features.label: Gateway
features.description: Default gateway address for static IP configuration

features.name: name_server
features.label: DNS
features.description: Name server address for static IP configuration
